title: Settings
confirm_logout: Are you sure you want to logout?
logout_failed_message: Could not complete logout. Your data may still be on this device.
sms_android_only: SMS transaction sync is only available on Android devices.
no_network_logout: No internet connection. Please check your network and try again.
logout_error: Something went wrong while logging out. Please try again.
auto_detect_description: Automatically detect transactions from new SMS
notification_permission_required: Please enable notifications in device settings to use live SMS detection.
sms_sync_permission_request_message: Monyvi needs SMS access to scan your messages for past transactions.
sms_sync_permission_blocked_message: To sync SMS messages, open Settings and allow SMS access for Monyvi.
sms_permission_request_message: Monyvi needs permission to receive new SMS messages.
sms_permission_blocked_message: To use live SMS detection, open Settings and allow SMS access for Monyvi.
notification_permission_request_message: Monyvi needs notifications to show you new transactions as they arrive.
notification_permission_blocked_message: To use live SMS detection, open Settings and allow notifications for Monyvi.
auto_confirm_description: Skip review and auto-add detected transactions
rescan_message: This will scan all SMS messages from scratch. Previously scanned messages will be automatically skipped.
sync_failed_message: Some data may not have been saved to the cloud. If you proceed, any unsynced data will be lost.
language_change_failed: Failed to change language. Please try again.
